_note: Synthetic vectors: the RBS301-ABM upstream codec ships no examples. Inputs are hand-built RadioBridge frames (byte[0]=protocol/counter, byte[1]=event type, then event-specific bytes); expected.data is the authored normalization, cross-checked against the upstream radio_bridge_packet_decoder.js (Generic_Decoder) as an oracle. ABM event 0x0E byte[2]: 0=Movement Started (moving), else=Movement Stopped (idle/cleared) -> action.motion.detected. Supervisory 0x01 byte[4] nibbles 0x36 -> 3.6 V battery.

uplink.description: Supervisory -> battery 3.6 V + tamper/error flags + accumulation
ABM frame truncated (missing state byte) -> error
